results.pageTitle: Power shortages likely to continue | Economy - Times Now

extractedData.headline: Power shortages likely to continue | Economy - Times Now
extractedData.summary: The power sector is likely to face more shortages in the coming months. While demand is expected to be robust given the higher than average summer temperature. The international coal prices have doubled on a YOY basis resulting in crowding for domestic coal supply. While the production of domestic coal has been ramped up; it is unlikely to meet the increased demand from across all sectors., Economy, Times Now

extractedData.summary: According to the order issued by state-run Gujarat Urja Vikas Nigam Limited (GUVNL), the weekly staggered holiday comes into immediate effect for all high-tension and low-tension users. However, the order is restricted to only industries with non-continuous processes.
